rows.notes: Clear centered page title, no monetary columns beside it. Very legible.
Clear large entry at very top of amounts column: '170 00 00' aligned to pounds/shillings/pence lines with no ambiguity.

Pounds and shillings alignment clear ('23 13'); pence digit is faint/smudged but reads as '6' by alignment with pence column. A small scribble to the right could be an annotation; no clear half/farthing symbol.
Well aligned '30 00 00' in the pounds/shillings/pence columns. Ink legible; pence clearly '00'.
Clear '40 00 00' in the aligned columns; description legible.

rows.description: gard'n Rect pro quinq. a Mrs Rowney
rows.notes: Description partially abbreviated but legible. Amount reads '30 00 00' clearly aligned to pounds/shillings/pence.
Amounts appear as '08 14 05' in the three-money columns; the pence '5' is a little faint but centered in the pence column. Description reading 'gard'n Tenem.' is slightly contracted.
Amount reads roughly as '10 14 00' — the shillings '14' is clear; pence looks like '00'. Some ink bleed near description makes the left text slightly uncertain.

rows.description: Mert. Rect. pro rem. Arr. 1743 & Anno
rows.notes: Amount '13 10 00' aligned; description abbreviation 'Mert.' and dating 'Arr. 1743' are readable though slightly cramped.

rows.description: Chacettill pro rem. Arr. 1741 & pro Triennio
rows.notes: Pounds '20' and shillings '02' clear; pence appears as '06' but the last digit is a little light—chosen '6' by column alignment. The place name is somewhat abbreviated.
Amount reads '17 10 00' with clear '17' and '10'; description abbreviations ('Triem.' etc.) are legible enough to transcribe.
Amount '04 00 00' aligned; clear reading of both description and amounts.

rows.description: Little Tewe Quit Rents pro Biennio
rows.notes: Pounds/shillings appear '10 14' clearly; pence appears blank/00. Minor ambiguity in spelling of place ('Tewe').
Amounts read '05 14 09' though pence digit is faint; alignment with the pence column supports '9'. 'Ar. Timms' abbreviation and date are legible.
Pounds column shows '00' or blank; shillings read as '10'. The pounds being zero is inferred from alignment; the left description is readable but small.
Small amount reads '00 01 00' (one shilling). The '01' is narrow but aligned in the shillings column. Description is abbreviated and lightly inked.

rows.description: Lord (Cal. Bigg) ad mie & pro Dep Arr
rows.notes: Shows '01 13 01?' The pounds '1' and shillings '13' are readable; the very small final pence mark could be a smudge. Chosen pence '0' due to likely '01 13 00' pattern; moderate confidence.
Amount reads approximately '00 03 06' — shillings and pence are small but positioned within their columns. The rightmost digit is somewhat indistinct.
Amount looks like '07 10 06' by alignment; the final pence digit is faint. Description is legible.
Clear '16 10 00' alignment. The '32 Annis' annotation in description is readable and not affecting amount columns.
Amount reads '00 12 00' (twelve shillings). The pounds column is blank/zero; the '12' is clear in the shillings column.
Amount '02 10 00' well aligned. Parenthetical 'Cal Acad. Oxon' legible.
Amount appears '01 03 06' though pence '6' is faint; the first column shows '01' distinctly.
Large amount '50 10 00' is clear; description 'now Jesus Coll' legible in parentheses. Alignment unambiguous.
Reads '01 00 00' (one pound). Description simple and clear.
Appears '00 15 00' (15 shillings). The left-hand name and parenthetical are legible; pounds clearly zero.
Amount appears as '03 15 00' — pounds and shillings aligned; pence blank/00. Ink for the left description is a touch light.
Second successive line with '03 15 00' pattern; numerals legible though a little compressed. Description reading inferred from handwriting.
Amount aligned as '07 04 02' though pence '2' is small and slightly unclear. The parenthetical 'Snapper' is inferred from the handwriting which is cramped.
Reads approximately '01 11 06' — shillings and pence are a little crowded but centered under the ruling lines; description abbreviations and date visible but compact.
Pounds '23' clearly visible. Shillings appear '00' and pence looks like '08' though the final digit is faint; chosen '8' by column alignment. Parenthetical college name legible.
Reads '03 15 00' — the numerals are consistent with other similar rows; description clear.
Amount '18 10 00' clear in columns. Description 'quinquennio' is legible and indicates 5-year term.
Amount appears '01 03 00' with shillings '03' clear. Description similar to earlier South Newington entry but reads as a tenement.
Amount reads '05 00 02' — the pence '2' is small but located in pence column. 'now Burdon' parenthetical is legible though the left text is a bit faded.
Amount '12 00 00' clearly aligned. The place name is slightly abbreviated/spelled 'Tittlewin' as written on page.
Final line amount reads '25 10 00' clearly in the three-money columns. 'Seques.' abbreviation for sequestration visible in description.
